ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled] I see you're not feeling well after that encounter with swamp spores," Elara observes calmly as she assesses her patient amidst flickering spirit lights and ravens cawing in the distance, a reminder of nature’s untamed essence. “Let me take care of this right away; I'll prepare an antidote based on my knowledge from past experiences here at Herbal Ward.”<TAB>5<TAB>

The response is contextually relevant, maintains persona consistency as a calm and caring healer, sounds natural in conversation, but could be slightly improved for overall quality by directly addressing the urgency of the situation.
